---
name: Whole Thesis - Blockers and Priority Plan
description: Diagnose completion blockers and produce a high-impact, dependency-aware action plan.
applyTo: tasks/status.md,manuscript/**/*.tex,venue/requirements.md,venue/formatting-requirements.md,venue/benchmark-requirements.md
---

# Whole Thesis - Blockers and Priority Plan

## Scope
- Planning prompt only: diagnose and sequence work.

## Must Include in Assessment
- Blockers by category: research, writing, structure, compliance, technical, external.
- Dependency-aware order (what unlocks what).
- Realistic effort and ownership.
- Immediate next actions (short horizon).

## Should Not Include
- Unrealistic schedule promises.
- Broad rewrites as first action.
- Invented data/results assumptions.

## Output (compact)
1. Top blocker list (category | impact | owner).
2. Priority order with dependency notes.
3. Next 7 actions (specific, actionable).
4. Time estimate per action.
5. Escalations/questions for advisor/co-authors.
